title: 10 best herbal teas for fungal skin infection
description: Hydrastis canadensis, also known as goldenseal, teas helps with fungal skin infection because of its antimicrobial properties. The berberine content in goldenseal tea has been shown to inhibit the growth of fungi, such as candida and athlete's foot. This tea's antifungal properties help to reduce inflammation and combat fungal overgrowth, promoting a healthy skin environment.
